---
title: "Quarto ❤️ Catppuccin"
---

[Quarto website](https://quarto.org)  

```python
# Python example
def greet(name: str):
    return f"Hello, {name}"
```
::: {.callout-note}
Note: This is a note callout.
:::

::: {.callout-tip}
Tip: A helpful tip.
:::

::: {.callout-warning}
Warning: Be careful!
:::

::: {.callout-important}
Important: Pay attention!
:::

::: {.callout-caution}
Caution: Proceed with caution.
:::

# Section 1
# Section 2
# Section 3
# Section 4
# Section 5
